architecture.summary: Batched summary LLM call via existing abstraction, skip+warn fallback

ui-ux.summary: No UI changes, CLI --seed flag only

performance.summary: ~50K token budget per batch, chunked fallback

security.summary: Sanitize LLM output, cap evidence arrays, Zod validation

edge-cases.summary: Empty project, LLM unavailable, malformed store, re-scan inflation
